headline: Weyerhaeuser Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) reported first-quarter 2026 GAAP earnings of $156 million, or $0.22 per diluted share, on net sales of $1.7 billion, as improved results in Wood Products and a strong quarter in Strategic Land Solutions helped lift overall profitability. headline: Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong EBITDA Growth Amid Market Challenges
summary: Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) reports a 120% increase in adjusted EBITDA, driven by strategic expansions and product innovations, despite facing global market headwinds.
